channel.title: Azure on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Azure on Arrans github.io

item.title: getsops/sops
item.description: Simple and flexible tool for managing secrets

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Responses API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-4o, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active project.

item.title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
item.description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI 🔗 https://microsoft.github.io/generative-ai-for-beginners/

item.title: google/go-cloud
item.description: The Go Cloud Development Kit (Go CDK): A library and tools for open cloud development in Go.

item.title: BandarLabs/gitpodcast
item.description: Convert any git repository into an engaging podcast

item.title: ilyas-it83/CloudComparer
item.description: Compare the various managed cloud services offered by the major public cloud providers in the market.
